## Source: amazon-inspector (711bd5a2f6cb47f1cf20cae950c1b89253561e63249de1fa2989ea5766f6f3bd)
The package @one-site/europcar was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7557adaa6a16b5e4b4b0a858b0ae3cd85711122fc9beab929e5da5a0f614aa79)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@one-site/europcar' @ 2.92.10 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
